chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 283 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 17.03.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General >>>>>..<<<<< The petitioner is permanently resident of District Shahdadkot at Kamber and he is seeking appointment from the respondents, who belonged to Larkana Region. In view of such circumstances, only the Circuit Court, Larkana has the territorial jurisdiction to entertain this matter. Since no one is in attendance, therefore, this petition is hereby dismissed as not maintainable for want of territorial jurisdiction before this Bench; however, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the proper bench for redressal of h is grievance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
